embed.title: !broadcast (admin)
embed.description: Send a message to every registered user. Useful for maintenance notices, feature announcements, or event warnings.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}broadcast Server restart tonight at 22:00 UTC — alerts will pause briefly.`

The message is sent as-is to every registered user via DM (Discord) or direct message (Telegram).

fields.name: Filter the audience
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}broadcast type:discord:user Your message` — only Discord users
`{{prefix}}broadcast type:telegram:user Your message` — only Telegram users

Other filter types: `role:<roleId>`, `community:<name>`. Consult the admin manual for the full list.

fields.name: Care
fields.value: Broadcasts count against per-user rate limits. A large broadcast can take minutes to complete as the dispatcher paces it through platform API limits. You'll see delivery progress in logs.
